result.summary: Context agents directory contains 7 files implementing AALang-based context loading with 4-mode-13-actor and 5-mode-15-actor patterns

agents.name: Context Loading Agent
agents.purpose: Loads and validates CLAUDE.md chain before work begins

agents.name: Layer 0 Universal Orchestrator
agents.purpose: Manages child agents across all layers, delegates tasks, aggregates results

agents.name: Orchestrator Runtime
agents.purpose: Common runtime behaviors shared by orchestrator agents

keyFeatures: Layer inheritance model (higher layers can override lower)
Confidence thresholds (0.6 for loading, 0.8 for work)
Safeguards: max depth, concurrent limits, task similarity check, circuit breaker
content.purpose: These agents implement context loading for the layer-stage system, ensuring AI agents understand their position and applicable rules before starting work. The orchestrator manages hierarchical agent spawning across layers with proper resource budgeting.
